title: Creamy Tomato Pasta
description: A simple yet satisfying pasta dish with a rich and creamy tomato sauce. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the crushed tomatoes and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the heavy cream and bring the sauce to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water and then drain the pasta.
Add the cooked pasta to the saucepan with the tomato sauce and toss to combine.
If the sauce is too thick, add a little of the reserved pasta water.
Season with salt and serve hot.
Serve immediately and savor the flavors.
